description: The framework's namesake, end-to-end: code.rs CALLS render_widget() but never DEFINES it (a hallucinated/unresolved symbol). The referential_truth binding greps for the definition and fails => referential_truth=false. The gate is the FRAMEWORK concept CoreGroundedCorrect (= grounding ∧ type ∧ totality ∧ spec); ∧ short-circuits to false, so Hallucinated=¬CoreGroundedCorrect is COMPUTED true and Keel returns NO-GO. The other three core atoms pass, isolating the cause to grounding. No other fixture gates a framework concept or exercises the Hallucinated path.
